title: Fixed-Length, Close-Delimited, Absent, and Incomplete Content
description: A body reader allocates from attacker Content-Length, treats premature EOF as success, consumes the next pipelined message, and reuses a connection after incomplete content. Learners cumulatively produce bounded fixed-length and close-delimited content reader through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Stream exactly the validated content length through independent policy limits without allocating the declared size.
Classify EOF before the required octet count as incomplete framing and prevent dispatch or connection reuse.
Stop after exactly the framed content and retain buffered residual bytes for the next message.
